situation: engine.rs L919-926: weighted_average_price() recomputes avg from (old_rounded_avg * old_qty + new_price * new_qty) / total_qty each fill. The old_avg was already round4'd, so multiplying back by qty reverses the rounding, introducing cumulative f64 drift across partial fills. After N fills the error grows as O(N * epsilon). Audit finding MM-L002.
action: Added total_cost: f64 field to OrderRecord (#[serde(default)] for backward compat). Buy fills accumulate total_cost += trade_price*qty + fees (true cost basis). Sell fills accumulate total_cost += trade_price*qty (turnover). avg_price derived as round4(total_cost / filled_quantity) at write time. Removed unused weighted_average_price function. Updated test assertion to reflect correct fee-inclusive avg_price semantics.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-engine passes; cargo test -p moni-engine 39/39 pass; cargo test -p moni-core 10/10 pass; commit f8d22fe pushed to origin/auto/opt-moni-engine-1782949388
